name: Kava
summary: Kava is best framed for short-term anxiety and relaxation research tied to kavalactone preparations, with safety screening for liver disease, alcohol use, sedatives, hepatotoxic medications, pregnancy, and prolonged daily use.
description: Kava is best framed for short-term anxiety and relaxation research tied to kavalactone preparations, with safety screening for liver disease, alcohol use, sedatives, hepatotoxic medications, pregnancy, and prolonged daily use.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

sources.title: Clinician guidelines for the treatment of psychiatric disorders with nutraceuticals and phytoceuticals: The World Federation of Societies of Biological Psychiatry (WFSBP) and Canadian Network for Mood and Anxiety Treatments (CANMAT) Taskforce
Pharmacotherapy of Anxiety Disorders: Current and Emerging Treatment Options
